summary.en: The Maldives National Standards Organization (MNSO) is the national standards body responsible for product standards in the Maldives. EMC compliance requirements are assessed as part of the CAM type approval process; test reports aligned with international standards (IEC/CISPR series) are accepted. There is no separate mandatory MNSO EMC mark equivalent to CE marking; EMC evidence is submitted as part of the CAM technical file. The Maldives has no active SAARC MRA covering EMC.
summary.zh: 马尔代夫国家标准组织（MNSO）是负责马尔代夫产品标准的国家标准机构。电磁兼容合规要求在CAM型式认可过程中进行审查；接受符合国际标准（IEC/CISPR系列）的测试报告。马尔代夫没有相当于CE标志的独立强制MNSO电磁兼容标志；电磁兼容证明作为CAM技术文件的一部分提交。马尔代夫无涵盖电磁兼容的有效SAARC互认协议。
summary.zht: 馬爾地夫國家標準組織（MNSO）是負責馬爾地夫產品標準的國家標準機構。電磁相容合規要求在CAM型式認可過程中進行審查；接受符合國際標準（IEC/CISPR系列）的測試報告。馬爾地夫沒有相當於CE標誌的獨立強制MNSO電磁相容標誌；電磁相容證明作為CAM技術文件的一部分提交。馬爾地夫無涵蓋電磁相容的有效SAARC互認協議。

summary.en: China GB/T 9254 series (EMC emission) and GB/T 17618 (immunity) form the domestic EMC baseline, administered via CCC certification for in-scope products. IEC/CISPR-aligned reports are routinely produced for export markets. Chinese EMC certification is not recognised by MNSO/CAM.
summary.zh: 中国GB/T 9254系列（电磁兼容辐射）和GB/T 17618（抗扰度）构成国内电磁兼容基线，通过CCC认证对适用产品进行管理。IEC/CISPR对齐的报告通常为出口市场出具。中国电磁兼容认证不被MNSO/CAM认可。
summary.zht: 中國GB/T 9254系列（電磁相容輻射）和GB/T 17618（抗擾度）構成國內電磁相容基線，透過CCC認證對適用產品進行管理。IEC/CISPR對齊的報告通常為出口市場出具。中國電磁相容認證不被MNSO/CAM認可。

gap.en: Partial gap: IEC/CISPR-aligned test reports (already produced for CE/FCC export) are accepted as supporting evidence within the CAM type approval technical file. No separate MNSO EMC mark is required. Gap is mainly administrative — reports must be explicitly submitted as part of the CAM application package.
gap.zh: 部分差距：符合IEC/CISPR的测试报告（通常已为CE/FCC出口出具）可作为CAM型式认可技术文件的辅助证明材料。无需单独的MNSO电磁兼容标志。差距主要在行政层面——报告须作为CAM申请材料包的一部分明确提交。
gap.zht: 部分差距：符合IEC/CISPR的測試報告（通常已為CE/FCC出口出具）可作為CAM型式認可技術文件的輔助證明材料。無需單獨的MNSO電磁相容標誌。差距主要在行政層面——報告須作為CAM申請材料包的一部分明確提交。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] IEC/CISPR-aligned EMC test reports (e.g. existing CE/FCC reports) should be included in the CAM type approval technical file. No separate MNSO EMC mark is required, but the CAM application must demonstrate EMC conformance through submitted test evidence.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 符合IEC/CISPR的电磁兼容测试报告（如现有CE/FCC报告）应纳入CAM型式认可技术文件。无需单独的MNSO电磁兼容标志，但CAM申请须通过提交的测试证明材料证明符合电磁兼容要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 符合IEC/CISPR的電磁相容測試報告（如現有CE/FCC報告）應納入CAM型式認可技術文件。無需單獨的MNSO電磁相容標誌，但CAM申請須透過提交的測試證明材料證明符合電磁相容要求。

requirement_topic.zh: 无线电频谱——5 GHz室内使用限制
requirement_topic.zht: 無線電頻譜——5 GHz室內使用限制

summary.en: CAM imposes an indoor-use restriction on 5 GHz Wi-Fi (UNII-2/2e bands, 5.25–5.725 GHz). Devices operating in the 5 GHz indoor-restricted bands may only be approved for indoor use in the Maldives. Technical documentation submitted to CAM must clearly identify the operating frequency bands and confirm indoor-only use for restricted channels. This mirrors common SAARC region practice and aligns with ITU recommendations for these bands.
summary.zh: CAM对5 GHz Wi-Fi（UNII-2/2e频段，5.25–5.725 GHz）实施室内使用限制。在马尔代夫，在5 GHz室内限制频段运行的设备只能获批用于室内使用。向CAM提交的技术文件须明确标明工作频段，并确认受限信道仅限室内使用。这与SAARC地区通行做法一致，并符合这些频段的ITU建议。
summary.zht: CAM對5 GHz Wi-Fi（UNII-2/2e頻段，5.25–5.725 GHz）實施室內使用限制。在馬爾地夫，在5 GHz室內限制頻段運行的裝置只能獲批用於室內使用。向CAM提交的技術文件須明確標明工作頻段，並確認受限信道僅限室內使用。這與SAARC地區通行做法一致，並符合這些頻段的ITU建議。

standards_or_laws: CAM Frequency Allocation and Spectrum Management Regulations
ITU Radio Regulations — 5 GHz band recommendations

summary.en: China SRRC approval covers 5 GHz Wi-Fi with specific EIRP limits and indoor-use designations consistent with ITU recommendations. GB 15629.11 governs 802.11a/n/ac in the 5 GHz band. Chinese approval does not confer Maldives rights but 5 GHz indoor restrictions are broadly aligned at the technical level.
summary.zh: 中国SRRC认可涵盖5 GHz Wi-Fi，具有与ITU建议一致的特定EIRP限值和室内使用指定。GB 15629.11规范5 GHz频段的802.11a/n/ac。中国认可不赋予马尔代夫权利，但5 GHz室内限制在技术层面大体一致。
summary.zht: 中國SRRC認可涵蓋5 GHz Wi-Fi，具有與ITU建議一致的特定EIRP限值和室內使用指定。GB 15629.11規範5 GHz頻段的802.11a/n/ac。中國認可不賦予馬爾地夫權利，但5 GHz室內限制在技術層面大體一致。

standards_or_laws: SRRC type approval for 5 GHz devices

gap.en: Narrow gap: technical 5 GHz indoor restrictions are broadly aligned with China's own SRRC requirements. The administrative gap is ensuring the CAM application explicitly documents indoor-only operation for restricted 5 GHz channels, and that product labelling reflects this restriction for the Maldives market.
gap.zh: 较小差距：5 GHz室内技术限制与中国SRRC要求大体一致。行政差距在于确保CAM申请明确记录受限5 GHz信道的仅限室内操作，并确保马尔代夫市场的产品标注反映该限制。
gap.zht: 較小差距：5 GHz室內技術限制與中國SRRC要求大體一致。行政差距在於確保CAM申請明確記錄受限5 GHz信道的僅限室內操作，並確保馬爾地夫市場的產品標注反映該限制。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] CAM type approval technical documentation must explicitly state indoor-only operation for 5 GHz restricted bands (5.25–5.725 GHz). Product labelling for the Maldives market should reflect this restriction. Chinese SRRC 5 GHz indoor restrictions are technically aligned but do not satisfy the CAM administrative requirement.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] CAM型式认可技术文件须明确说明5 GHz受限频段（5.25–5.725 GHz）仅限室内操作。马尔代夫市场的产品标注应反映该限制。中国SRRC的5 GHz室内限制在技术上一致，但不满足CAM的行政要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] CAM型式認可技術文件須明確說明5 GHz受限頻段（5.25–5.725 GHz）僅限室內操作。馬爾地夫市場的產品標注應反映該限制。中國SRRC的5 GHz室內限制在技術上一致，但不滿足CAM的行政要求。
